Project 01

PassVault 2.0

Password Manager · Cryptography · Desktop App

View on GitHub ↗

A Python desktop password manager built on strong cryptographic foundations. Uses Argon2id for key derivation and AES-128-CBC for encryption. Integrates the HaveIBeenPwned k-anonymity API for breach checking without ever transmitting the actual password, and includes a cryptographically secure password generator. The master password is never stored — an incorrect password simply results in failed decryption.

Python Argon2id AES-128-CBC HaveIBeenPwned API Cryptography Desktop App

Project 02

LogSentinel

Log Analyzer · SIEM Dashboard · Threat Detection

View on GitHub ↗

A Python-based log analyzer for detecting brute force, SQL injection, XSS, and path traversal across Apache, syslog, and Windows Event logs. Features a SIEM-style dashboard with charts, GeoIP lookup, IP whitelist/blacklist management, live log monitoring via tail -f, email alerting, and CSV/TXT export for reporting.

Python SIEM Brute Force Detection SQLi / XSS GeoIP Live Monitoring Email Alerts

Project 03

LogSentinel 2.0

AI-Powered SOC Triage · MITRE ATT&CK · Claude API

View on GitHub ↗

An upgraded version of LogSentinel with an integrated AI-powered SOC triage assistant built on the Claude API. Automatically maps detected threats to MITRE ATT&CK techniques, reducing analyst workload during triage. Retains all core detection capabilities — brute force, SQLi, XSS, and path traversal — across Apache, syslog, and Windows Event logs, with a SIEM dashboard, GeoIP lookup, IP management, live monitoring, and email alerts.

Python Claude API MITRE ATT&CK SOC Triage AI / LLM SIEM Threat Detection

Project 04

IOC Checker

Threat Intelligence · IOC Analysis · VirusTotal · AbuseIPDB · Shodan

View on GitHub ↗

A Python desktop threat intelligence tool that cross-references IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes against VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and Shodan. Features automatic IOC type detection, batch mode for bulk lookups, verdict scoring, history tracking, and JSON export. No external dependencies.

Python VirusTotal API AbuseIPDB Shodan Threat Intelligence Batch Mode IOC Analysis

Project 05

HashScan

File Forensics · Hash Analysis · Entropy · Malware Detection

View on GitHub ↗

A Python desktop file forensics tool that computes MD5, SHA1, SHA256, and SHA512 hashes, calculates Shannon entropy to detect packed or encrypted files, extracts suspicious strings, and cross-references results against VirusTotal and MalwareBazaar. Supports single file scanning, hash lookups, and batch mode. No external dependencies.

Python Shannon Entropy MD5 / SHA1 / SHA256 / SHA512 VirusTotal API MalwareBazaar File Forensics Malware Detection
